user_claim: Customer: The shipping box arrived in bad condition. | Support: What kind of condition issue are you reporting? | Customer: It looked badly crushed when it was delivered. | Support: Is the claim about the outside box or the product inside? | Customer: The outside box. I want the crushed box reviewed.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed package is not clearly visible in any submitted image, and no relevant evidence supports the claim.
claim_status_justification: The claim is about the exterior shipping box being crushed, but no images show the shipping box or its condition. The only submitted image (img_1) shows a dented product can, which is unrelated to the claim.
